author: Paul of Pyskowice
title: Commentum in Officium missae cum quaestionibus et excerptis ex Libro de sacrificio missae Alberti Magni compilatum
remarks: Wlodek, Pawel z Pyskowic,” Materialy 5 (1965): 142—168. 550 folia. Stanislaus de Zawada has annotated this manuscript according to the catalogue (354-5).
link: Biblioteka Jagiellońska, BJ Rkp. 1394 III t. 1 (f. 1r-265v); t. 2 (f. 2r-313v). First part. Second part; CCrac. 2213, ff. 147-181a
